overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an action RPG showing a warrior in red robes carrying a long staff, walking through a snowy East Asian temple complex. The character approaches a grand staircase, ascends through an ornate wooden gate, and continues toward a large pagoda and temple hall surrounded by snow-covered mountains.

large traditional wooden gate with curved roofs marking the entrance to the inner temple
snow-capped mountain peaks surrounding the temple complex in the background
traditional stone lanterns flanking the pathway on the left side
traditional stone lanterns flanking the pathway on the right side
wooden temple building with curved roof on the left side of the courtyard
wooden temple building with curved roof on the right side of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide snow-dusted stone courtyard toward an ornate temple gate. A tall seven-tiered pagoda rises in the background against snow-covered mountains, while traditional wooden pavilions line both sides of the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase leading through ornate wooden gate structure

events.description: begins ascending the wide stone stairs toward the temple gate
passes underneath the ornate wooden gate structure with detailed beams and hanging ornaments

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs while holding a long staff, approaching and passing through the temple gate

entered.detail: intricately carved wooden beams and supports of the gate structure overhead
decorative elements and lanterns hanging from the gate ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long flight of stone stairs toward and through an ornate wooden gate. The camera moves under the gate's intricately carved beams, transitioning from the open courtyard into the covered gate structure while the pagoda remains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper temple terrace with guardian statues and main hall

events.description: emerges from the gate onto the upper terrace revealing the main temple hall and large guardian statues

agents.ego_description: walking across the upper terrace toward the main temple hall, passing between two large guardian statues

notable_agents.action: large green guardian statue standing motionless holding a weapon
large green guardian statue standing motionless holding a weapon

entered.detail: large traditional temple building with wide stairs and snow-covered roof at the end of the terrace
massive green statue of a warrior or deity standing guard on the left side
massive green statue of a warrior or deity standing guard on the right side
wide central staircase leading up to the main temple hall entrance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate, the scene opens onto an upper terrace flanked by two massive green guardian statues. The character walks toward a grand main temple hall with a wide central staircase, while the seven-tiered pagoda remains visible in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, snow-dusted courtyard toward the elevated heart of a traditional temple complex. It begins with the character walking across a stone plaza flanked by wooden pavilions, with a towering seven-tiered pagoda and snow-capped mountains framing the distant horizon. As the character advances, the camera follows them up a long flight of stone stairs and passes beneath the intricately carved beams of an ornate wooden gate. The scene then opens onto an upper terrace guarded by two massive green statues, shifting the perspective from the enclosed gateway to a broad view of the grounds. Finally, the camera tracks the character toward a grand main temple hall and its wide central staircase, while the distant pagoda remains a constant landmark against the winter sky.
